title: Personel Hareketliliği İçin Başvurular Açılıyor!
content: Our academic and administrative staff who want to benefit from Erasmus+ Staff Mobility for the 2024-2025 Academic Year must log in and complete their applications by clicking on the e-government button at https://turnaportal.ua.gov.tr/ for teaching/training mobility between 30.06.2025 - 30.07.2025.
